description: Use this API to change the station FACTS device node terminal data connection in the working case. This api is defined using the sending or terminal bus number and specifying the desired node number to connect to at that end. This API routine was first introduced in release 35.5. ierr = station_facts_bus_term_chng(name, ibus, inode)

parameters.name: name
parameters.description: Quoted name of the facts device whose node terminal connection data is being changed. (input).

parameters.name: ibus
parameters.description: Bus number of desired facts device sending or terminal end being modified. (input; no default allowed).

parameters.name: inode
parameters.description: Node number to which the facts device sending or terminal end is to be attached. node must correspond to ibus. (input).

error_codes.description: bus is not part of a substation.
Node-breaker terminal connection table is full.
prerequisite requirements for API are not met.
bus not associated with FACTS device.
